## Purpose

<!-- What single problem or boundary does this change address? -->

## Evidence state

- [ ] Direct observations are separated from interpretation.
- [ ] External claims cite exact sources or pinned commits.
- [ ] Hypotheses remain labelled and falsifiable.
- [ ] Blender work states the exact version and execution status.

## Validation

- [ ] `virtualauto validate`
- [ ] `python -m unittest discover -s tests -v`
- [ ] Relevant controlled experiment or diagnostic was run, or the PR explains why not.
- [ ] Fresh-file and motion/performance checks are recorded where production qualification is claimed.

## Asset and rights boundary

- [ ] No package, extracted game data, third-party model, texture, key, credential, or local cache is included.
- [ ] New external code has a recorded commit and license state.
- [ ] Source and derived artifacts have provenance and loss assessments where applicable.

## Limitations and unresolved questions

<!-- State what this PR deliberately does not establish. -->
